comment.body:
Yes. I trade options. But my knowledge base in advanced options is still limited. For example, I’ve never heard of the second order Greeks like vanna or charm until recently. 
Never heard of concepts such as speed, skew, zero gamma, dealer hedging, etc until recently. 
My options trades are mostly debit spreads based on projected price levels that I anticipate price moving to.
